raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased items on XX/XX/XXXX, in the amount of {$400.00}. 
The merchant could not fufill the entire order and returned {$40.00}. 
I recieved the items approximately XX/XX/XXXX. 
Merchant policy is 1 month to ship items back. 
I contacted the merchant XX/XX/XXXX to discuss return process. 
Items were returned XX/XX/XXXX. 
Merchant then closed the ticket XX/XX/XXXX, and stated if further action is needed to contact my bank. The matter is closed with them. 

After some time, I noticed I had still not recieved my refund so I began the dispute with my Credit Card company. The exact date of first dispute is unknown, but the first fax confirmation I have regarding the dispute with my Credit Card company is XX/XX/XXXX. Meaning this dispute has continued for at least 5 months. I have provided shipping details, as well as conversation with the merchant that the ticket has been closed. The Credit Card company is now telling me it's been too long, even though I have been disputing this monthly since early XXXX.
